name: Ghost Ogre & Rabbit Spirit
desc: When your opponent activates a monster effect in their hand or field (Quick Effect): You can send this card from your hand or field to the GY; destroy that monster, then if that monster is not destroyed, your opponent must send it to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Ghost Ogre & Rabbit Spirit" once per turn.
strings: Send to GY to destroy opponent's monster
